headings: BROWNSTONE CONSTRUCTION, LTD. SUBCONTRACT FOR Allegra at Shreveport
text: - 3.5. Subcontractor shall establish and enforce its own safety program for the protection of all persons and  property  in  connection  with  the  Subcontract  Work.  A  copy  of  Brownstone  Construction,  Ltd.  SAFETY PROGRAM (the 'Safety Program') is attached hereto and incorporated herein by reference as Exhibit 'B' .  The Safety Program is also posted on the job site. Prior to performing any labor in association with the Project, the Subcontractor  agrees  to  educate  its  employees  on  the  Safety  Program  requirements.  The  SAFETY  PROGRAM contains Brownstone Construction, Ltd. DRUG AND ALCOHOL POLICY. The Subcontractor shall comply with the Safety Program and Subcontractor agrees that Subcontractor and Subcontractor's employees will adhere to it as a minimum standard for this Project.
